# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `QR-001`
- Title: `Enforce CI quality gate baseline`
- Persona/Actor: `Maintainer`
- Value statement: `For maintainers, deliver enforceable CI quality gates to achieve stable merges and early defect detection.`
- Context: `Every pull request targeting main branch.`
- Problem statement: `Without enforced gates, regression risk increases and release confidence declines.`
- Expected outcome: `Merges are blocked when build, type, lint, or formatting checks fail.`
- Success metric(s): `100% of merged PRs pass required checks; no direct bypass outside admin emergency workflow.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `CI runs build, typecheck, lint, and format checks on PRs.`
  - `Required checks are configured as merge-blocking in repository settings.`
  - `Failure messages are visible and actionable in CI output.`
- Non-goals: `Full performance regression suite, cross-browser matrix beyond agreed baseline.`
- Constraints: `Tooling must remain compatible with Node.js 22 LTS baseline.`
- Dependencies: `OR-001 deployment flow, OR-TOOL-001 toolchain baseline.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes all contributors use lockfile-consistent installs.`
- Validation approach: `CI pipeline validation on sample failing/passing PRs.`
- Priority score: `93`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#QR-001`
  - ADR: `n/a`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
